title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report November 29 2024
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report November 29 2024
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report November 29 2024
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 29/11/2024
Today, Dalian iron ore futures ﬂuctuated upward, with the most-traded I2501 contract closing at 797.5 yuan/mt, up 1.14% for the day. Tradersactively sold oﬀ their stocks, while steel mills remained cautious, with some mills locking in profits through good sales of finished products and increasing their procurement volume of raw materials. The market trading atmosphere was moderate today.
